title: > Content to Critique:
content:
> Content to Critique:
> [INSERT CONTENT HERE]
>
Step 2: Logic Check
Purpose: Ensure internal consistency and sound reasoning.
> Prompt:
> Act as a Formal Logician and Philosopher. Your task is to perform a "Logic Check" on the provided content. You must rigorously scrutinize the text for internal consistency and the validity of its reasoning. Ignore style; focus only on the mechanics of the argument.
> Please identify:
> * Contradictions: Any two statements that cannot both be true.
> * Logical Fallacies: Identify specific fallacies (e.g., circular reasoning, strawman, slippery slope, false dichotomy).
> * Gaps in Reasoning: Steps where the conclusion does not follow from the premise.
> * Coherence Score: Rate the logical coherence on a scale of 1-10 and explain the deduction.
> Content to Check:
> [INSERT CONTENT HERE]
>
Step 3: Logos Review
Purpose: Assess the clarity and persuasiveness of rational arguments.
> Prompt:
> Act as a Debater and Data Analyst. Your task is to conduct a "Logos Review" (Appeal to Reason). You are evaluating the intellectual weight and factual appeal of the content.
